task_description: Generate a complete GROMACS workflow to calculate the density of pure water at 300 K and 1 bar.
Generate a GROMACS post-processing workflow to calculate the oxygen-oxygen radial distribution function of pure water at 300 K.
Generate a GROMACS post-processing workflow to calculate the self-diffusion coefficient of pure water at 300 K using mean square displacement analysis.
Generate a GROMACS post-processing workflow to calculate the hydrogen-bond number of pure water at 300 K.
Generate a GROMACS post-processing workflow to calculate the mass density profile of pure water along the z direction at 300 K.
Generate a GROMACS post-processing workflow to calculate the oxygen-hydrogen radial distribution function of pure water at 300 K.
Generate a GROMACS post-processing workflow to calculate the oxygen-oxygen coordination number of pure water at 300 K from the radial distribution function.
Generate a GROMACS post-processing workflow to validate equilibration of pure water at 300 K and 1 bar using temperature, pressure, density, total energy, and box volume time series.

Generate a GROMACS workflow to preprocess a pure water trajectory at 300 K by correcting periodic boundary conditions, making molecules whole, centering the system, and producing a cleaned trajectory for later analysis.
Generate a GROMACS post-processing workflow to extract and validate the temperature time series of pure water at 300 K from an energy file.
